title: RollbackDetails
description: Details about an instance refresh rollback.

allOf.description: The reason for this instance refresh rollback (for example, whether a manual or automatic rollback was initiated).
The date and time at which the rollback began.
Indicates the value of PercentageComplete at the time the rollback started.
Indicates the value of InstancesToUpdate at the time the rollback started.

Reports progress on replacing instances in an Auto Scaling group that has a warm pool. This includes separate details for instances in the warm pool and instances in the Auto Scaling group (the live pool).
